title: caruelina pubescens
intro: Caruelina pubescens, also known as green dragon, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Caruelina pubescens can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
